import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def get_observation(state):
    """Extract minimal observation focused on navigation essentials."""
    # Get grid dimensions
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    
    # Agent position (normalized to [0, 1])
    agent_pos = state.agent.position.astype(jnp.float32)
    norm_agent_y = agent_pos[0] / (H - 1)
    norm_agent_x = agent_pos[1] / (W - 1)
    
    # Find goal position
    goal_mask = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == 6)  # GOAL tile ID is 6
    
    # Get coordinates using meshgrid
    ys = jnp.arange(H, dtype=jnp.float32)
    xs = jnp.arange(W, dtype=jnp.float32)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    
    # Goal position (normalized)
    goal_count = jnp.sum(goal_mask)
    goal_y = jnp.sum(yy * goal_mask) / jnp.maximum(goal_count, 1.0)
    goal_x = jnp.sum(xx * goal_mask) / jnp.maximum(goal_count, 1.0)
    norm_goal_y = goal_y / (H - 1)
    norm_goal_x = goal_x / (W - 1)
    
    # Direction to goal (normalized displacement)
    rel_y = (goal_y - agent_pos[0]) / (H - 1)
    rel_x = (goal_x - agent_pos[1]) / (W - 1)
    
    # Manhattan distance to goal (normalized)
    manhattan_dist = jnp.abs(agent_pos[0] - goal_y) + jnp.abs(agent_pos[1] - goal_x)
    max_manhattan = (H - 1) + (W - 1)
    norm_manhattan = manhattan_dist / max_manhattan
    
    # Agent direction as normalized angle
    norm_direction = state.agent.direction.astype(jnp.float32) / 3.0
    
    # Simple 6-feature observation
    observation = jnp.array([
        norm_agent_y,    # Agent Y position
        norm_agent_x,    # Agent X position  
        rel_y,           # Direction to goal Y
        rel_x,           # Direction to goal X
        norm_manhattan,  # Manhattan distance to goal
        norm_direction   # Agent facing direction
    ])
    
    return observation.astype(jnp.float32)

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    """Compute reward with simple distance shaping."""
    # Find goal position
    goal_mask = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == 6)
    
    # Get coordinates
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    ys = jnp.arange(H, dtype=jnp.float32)
    xs = jnp.arange(W, dtype=jnp.float32)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    
    # Goal position
    goal_count = jnp.sum(goal_mask)
    goal_y = jnp.sum(yy * goal_mask) / jnp.maximum(goal_count, 1.0)
    goal_x = jnp.sum(xx * goal_mask) / jnp.maximum(goal_count, 1.0)
    
    # Agent positions
    agent_pos = state.agent.position.astype(jnp.float32)
    next_agent_pos = next_state.agent.position.astype(jnp.float32)
    
    # Manhattan distances to goal
    prev_manhattan = jnp.abs(agent_pos[0] - goal_y) + jnp.abs(agent_pos[1] - goal_x)
    curr_manhattan = jnp.abs(next_agent_pos[0] - goal_y) + jnp.abs(next_agent_pos[1] - goal_x)
    
    # Distance improvement reward (Manhattan-based)
    distance_reward = prev_manhattan - curr_manhattan
    
    # Check if agent reached goal
    agent_y, agent_x = next_agent_pos[0].astype(jnp.int32), next_agent_pos[1].astype(jnp.int32)
    on_goal = (next_state.grid[agent_y, agent_x, 0] == 6)
    goal_bonus = jax.lax.select(on_goal, 5.0, 0.0)
    
    # Simple two-term reward
    total_reward = distance_reward + goal_bonus
    
    return total_reward.astype(jnp.float32)
